case_title: VERA JOYCE GRAGNANI VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,092.00 FILED BY GRAGNANI, VERA JOYCE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JANE DOE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GRAGNANI, VERA JOYCE
DECLARATION OF VER JOYCE GARNANI FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAGNANI, VERA JOYCE
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-27-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-16-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (DISMISSAL ENTERD ON OCT-30-2012 AS TO **ONLY**: JANE DOE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAGNANI, VERA JOYCE AS TO DEFENDANT JANE DOE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED OCT-30-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. . APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOYCELYN PEREZ-CCSF. DISMISSAL FILED ON 10/30/12 AGAINST DEFENDANT JANE DOE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAGNANI, VERA JOYCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 11/28/2012 TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
